name: nitrobenzene_redox_potential
prompt: Run the redox-potential task on nitrobenzene using the GFN2-xTB method in implicit water solvent, referenced to SHE, for the 0->-1 redox couple (oxidized charge 0 mult 1, reduced charge -1 mult 2). Report the standard redox potential in volts vs SHE as the headline value (the task also returns delta_E_redox in eV/kcal — do NOT report those as the headline value), and state the method, reference electrode, and charges used. Note GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical) redox potentials are screening-grade, ~±0.3-0.5 V; this is a screening estimate (default adiabatic mode — each oxidation state is geometry-optimized separately; do not switch to vertical mode; implicit solvent only). Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
